title: U.S. says it struck two Iran-flagged oil tankers trying to skirt blockade
summary_full: The shaky U.S. ceasefire with Iran has been repeatedly undermined this week, even as President Donald Trump insists it remains in effect.
summary_public: The shaky U.S. ceasefire with Iran has been repeatedly undermined this week, even as President Donald Trump insists it remains in effect.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: struck two Iran-flagged oil tankers trying to skirt blockade
